special_mechanics.name: Eight-Direction Movement
special_mechanics.description: Mike can move in eight different directions, an improvement over the original StarTropics which was more limited

special_mechanics.name: Mid-Air Direction Change
special_mechanics.description: Mike can change directions in mid-jump, enabling responsive aerial control

tier_notes: Tier 2: Empirical/qualitative data only. No specific numerical physics values documented in available sources. Game runs on modified engine of original StarTropics. Movement improvements noted qualitatively: 8-directional movement and mid-air direction changes. Controls described as below average compared to contemporaries but improved over first game.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Zoda's Revenge: StarTropics II (Gameplay section)
The Cutting Room Floor - Zoda's Revenge: StarTropics II
